title: Dutch Pineapple Skillet Cake
description: Moist and flavorful Dutch pineapple skillet cake, perfect for a sweet treat. This cake is made with a unique combination of ingredients that will transport you to the Caribbean.
instructions: Combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, oil, and crushed pineapple.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
Pour the batter into the prepared skillet.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Serve warm with a sprinkle of cinnamon.
